name: sdxl-lightning
notes_low: Uses SDXL Lightning 4-step full checkpoint (all-in-one) with conservative upscale/detail defaults for low-tier targets.
notes_high: Uses SDXL Lightning 8-step full checkpoint (all-in-one) with larger upscale/detail defaults for high-tier targets.
description: Photographic SDXL Lightning pack for fast T2I, editing, inpaint, detail, and tiling workflows.
